intake.label: Structured Brief
intake.description: Prompt parsing is materially better than v1, but still heuristic and local-only.

concepts.label: Concept Generation
concepts.description: ComfyUI is the default concept backend. The procedural generator remains debug-only.

refine.label: Refinement
refine.description: Refinement creates new concept candidates and records lineage from the selected concept.

master_pose.label: Master Pose
master_pose.description: Three extraction-ready master poses are generated from the approved concept and one must be explicitly approved.

sprite_model.label: Sprite Model
sprite_model.description: The tool extracts canonical parts from the approved master pose and persists deterministic correction operations.

layer_review.label: Sprite Model
layer_review.description: The build panel now edits the extracted sprite model rather than showing placeholder procedural layers.

rig_review.label: Rig Review
rig_review.description: Rigging binds extracted sprite-model parts to deterministic joints and neutral pose output.

production.label: Production
production.description: Idle and walk clips are rendered deterministically from the approved sprite model and rig with no AI frame generation.

qa.label: QA
qa.description: QA validates implemented deterministic asset checks and blocks export when required checks fail.

export.label: Export
export.description: Exports package the deterministic sprite sheet, frames, metadata, and preview from the real sprite-model path.
